Headline: #77 Belmont Temporary Reroute at Belmont/Kilbourn
ShortDescription: 77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Belmont/Kilbourn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Pulaski, Diversey, Cicero, and Belmont then to resume over regular route, due to a street blockage near Belmont/Kilbourn.

Allow extra travel time.
